title: athyrium deltoideum
intro: Athyrium deltoideum, also known as the lady fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family and is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium deltoideum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
